tasks.label: backend-dev
args: Get-Content .env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match '=' -and -not $_.StartsWith('#') } | ForEach-Object { $name, $value = $_ -split '=', 2; [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable($name.Trim(), $value.Trim(), 'Process') }; python -m uvicorn api.index:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
